board_csa_architect.notes: No schema impact. Pure frontend runtime optimization. Reduces API call volume and adds crash isolation. Aligns with North Star goal of a production-grade dashboard.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: No security impact. No auth flow changes. Request deduplication in apiFetch does not affect JWT refresh mutex. ErrorBoundary is purely UI-level crash isolation.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No VRAM or AI model impact. Frontend-only JavaScript optimizations. Code quality improvement through usePolling hook extraction and ErrorBoundary pattern.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Directly improves operational resilience. ErrorBoundary prevents full dashboard crashes. Visibility-aware polling reduces server load by ~1440 requests/hour during idle. Passes 3AM test: dashboard remains functional even if one widget fails.

board_red_team.notes: 3 failure scenarios documented: (1) dedup cache race condition, (2) ErrorBoundary interval leak, (3) visibility API edge case on mobile browsers. STRIDE: all 6 categories assessed as N/A or Low risk. 4 anti-AC in spec are sufficient. APPROVE — low attack surface, frontend-only.
